_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

reason: 检查 stable mode id、runtime dependency、schema 与 package contract 一致性
检查 dispatcher fail-closed、共享 runtime SSOT 与脚本职责边界
执行 schema、source、installed、dogfood、throwaway 与 Branch Review 验证
检查 fresh install、update/reapply、managed inventory、sidecar 与平台选择
检查 canonical package 与 shared/Codex/Cursor/Claude discovery copies 无漂移
检查 durable requirements 与三份 public README 语义一致
检查 interface 到 installed runtime 的跨层合同完整性
检查 package 未复制共享 parser、task/gate 或 Git transaction 能力
